name: switch
description: Animated toggle switch with track color interpolation, thumb translation, label, and description.

props.name: value
props.description: The current on/off state of the switch.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Callback fired when the switch is toggled, receives the new boolean value.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional text label rendered beside the switch.

props.name: description
props.description: Optional secondary description text rendered below the label.

props.name: labelPosition
props.description: Which side of the switch the label appears on.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When true, the switch is non-interactive and visually dimmed.

props.name: accessibilityLabel
props.description: Custom accessibility label; falls back to the label prop.

props.name: accessibilityHint
props.description: Accessibility hint describing the action the switch performs.
